artifacts.name: Amulet of Steadfast Mind
artifacts.description: A carved stone amulet that glows faintly with internal light

artifacts.name: Bracers of the Defender's Grip
artifacts.description: Worn leather bracers reinforced with ancient metal
artifacts.special: Wearer gains +20% defense when on garrison

artifacts.name: Cloak of the Spirit Walker
artifacts.description: A translucent garment that shimmers between colors
artifacts.special: Wearer sees hidden natures more clearly

artifacts.name: Ring of Perseverance
artifacts.description: A simple band of unknown metal that never tarnishes

artifacts.name: Tome of Forgotten Lore
artifacts.description: A leather-bound book filled with handwritten knowledge
artifacts.special: Can be studied to gain research insights

artifacts.name: Pendant of Mist Sense
artifacts.description: A crystalline pendant that pulses with faint awareness
artifacts.special: Mistwalker wearing this discovers 30% more findings
